title: Unchecked AI progress may pose catastrophic risks, UN panel warns

content:

title: Artificial intelligence and data analytics play pivotal roles in Wimbledon
description: Data analytics from artificial intelligence may have assisted a professional tennis player’s next shot at Wimbledon. Like many sports, tennis is adapting to AI, using data analytics into sports science methodologies to better model how the human body performs, strengthens and recovers. Analytics can improve an athlete’s split-second decision making

title: RBI's latest worry isn't inflation. It's artificial intelligence
description: The RBI has identified AI-enabled cyber threats as the most significant emerging risk for banks and NBFCs. It said weak preparedness, shared platforms and third-party dependence could deepen systemic disruption.
content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) may be helping banks become smarter and faster, but India's central bank believes it is also creating one of the biggest new threats to the country's financial system.
